steps.title: Square the mile conversion
steps.content:
Since area is measured in square units, square the linear conversion:
$$1\ \text{square mile}=(1{,}760)^2\ \text{square yards}$$
$$1{,}760^2=3{,}097{,}600$$

steps.title: Convert square miles
steps.content:
Multiply by the township's area:
$$5.12(3{,}097{,}600)=15{,}859{,}712$$
The answer is D.
